section.heading: Protection of services and recreational opportunities

content.p: Nothing in this subchapter limits commercial services for existing or historic recreation uses, as authorized by the permit process of the Bureau of Land Management.
Commercial permits to exercise guided recreational opportunities for the public that are authorized as of March 12, 2019, may continue to be authorized.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 103–433, title XIV, § 1406, as added Pub. L. 116–9, title I, § 1441, Mar. 12, 2019, 133 Stat. 710.)
